ContentDesc_Des Händlers kuriose Liebesm: The Merchant's Tale depicts a Corvos from before the Garlean occupation, made even more wondrous by the flourishes of countless storytellers throughout the ages. As you relate the details of your time within its pages to Osmon, he continues the timeless storytelling tradition by adding his own embellishments to an already fantastic fable, and you feel yourself drawn back in to the beautiful but increasingly dangerous world of folklore...
